name: frontend-architecture
description: Frontend architecture scaffold and audit tools, currently including React layered architecture for Next.js App Router and Expo Router.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold and audit frontend project structures, starting with React layered architecture.
interface.longDescription: Frontend architecture helper plugin. The first included skill scaffolds and audits React projects using Next.js App Router or Expo Router with a src-based 3-layer structure, strict TypeScript, @/* path aliases, root .env.example, Zod env validation, optional Biome setup, feature modules, and architecture boundary checks.
defaultPrompt: Build a Next.js App Router project structure with React layered architecture.
Add a feature module to this React layered architecture project.
Audit this project's frontend architecture boundaries.
